title: Forensic
subTitle: When a psychotic murderer sets out on a killing spree, Samuel, a medico-legal advisor, uses his forensic skills to unravel the truth behind the heinous deeds.

title: Jai Mahashakti
subTitle: The king of Travancore is ruthless and tortures his subjects. However, Vaikundasamy, an incarnation of Lord Vishnu, decides to put an end to this tyranny.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Afsana Dilwalon Ka
subTitle: A gifted singer, Banne Khan, falls in love with Saba. However, Titlibai, a woman who wants him to marry her daughter, invites him to stay at her house.

title: Muqadama
subTitle: Ajit returns home to see that his wife has killed herself after being raped by three men. He tries to avenge her but is caught by the police and sentenced to be hanged after he kills one culprit.

title: Karma
subTitle: Accompanied by a troubled trio of prisoners, a high-ranking law enforcement officer sets out to avenge the miseries inflicted upon his family by an anti-national group.

title: Baaghi
subTitle: Determined to rescue his former love, the ruggedly handsome Ronny confronts his enemies with a flurry of powerful roundhouse kicks and bone-crushing punches.

title: Jaan
subTitle: A police commissioner recruits a gentleman to safeguard his granddaughter, yet he remains oblivious to the hidden peril. This operative is an assassin dispatched by a relative to eliminate the heir and seize the vast property.

title: Saamy 2
subTitle: Ramasamy, who works as a front-end receptionist for Union Minister Viswanathan, decides to pursue civil service. Soon, Viswanathan's daughter falls in love with him after he saves her from gangsters.

title: RRR
subTitle: A fearless revolutionary and an officer in the British force, who once shared a deep bond, decide to join forces and chart out an inspirational path of freedom against the despotic rulers.

title: Coolie
subTitle: Zafar's obsessive love for Salma leads to her separation from her son, Iqbal. Twenty years later, Iqbal strives to reunite with his mother.

title: Coolie
subTitle: Zafar's obsessive love for Salma leads to her separation from her son, Iqbal. Twenty years later, Iqbal strives to reunite with his mother.

title: Jai Mahashakti
subTitle: The king of Travancore is ruthless and tortures his subjects. However, Vaikundasamy, an incarnation of Lord Vishnu, decides to put an end to this tyranny.

title: Friendship
subTitle: After getting involved in the murder of a man they hired to play a prank on their aunt, two friends attempt to clear their names.

title: Ajagajantharam
subTitle: A minor disagreement at a village festival sparks conflict between locals and youths. The situation turns chaotic, yet the locals manage to flee with assistance from their animal.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Ramayan
subTitle: Prince Rama embarks on a daring mission to save his kidnapped wife Sita from the evil Ravana. Aided by his loyal brother Lakshmana and an army of monkeys, Rama faces difficult challenges in his journey to Lanka.

title: Main Prem Ki Diwani Hoon
subTitle: Sanjana falls in love with Prem Kishen after mistaking him for his boss, Prem Kumar, whom she is actually supposed to marry. But, the relationship is threatened when Prem Kishen reveals the truth.

title: Krrish
subTitle: After discovering his father's truth, Krrish must reveals his superpowers to the world and becomes the masked superhero.

title: Badal
subTitle: Badal's family dies at the hands of a corrupt police officer. While he is raised by his father's friend, he turns into a terrorist and vows to avenge his family's death.

title: Dacait
subTitle: After being mercilessly beaten and abandoned to die, a young man is rescued by a band of dacoits, who nurse him back to health in their hidden lair.

title: Gadar 2
subTitle: Upon learning about his father's disappearance at the border, Jeete believes that his father is captured and sets out to rescue him in Pakistan.

title: Hitler
subTitle: Siddhanth Sharma, a strict disciplinarian, is forced to chase hi brother, Amar, after he is accused of murder. However, his wife, Sheila, a lawyer, decides to defend Amar.

title: Hitler
subTitle: Siddhanth Sharma, a strict disciplinarian, is forced to chase hi brother, Amar, after he is accused of murder. However, his wife, Sheila, a lawyer, decides to defend Amar.

title: Prem Deewane
subTitle: A young couple in love run away together after their parents oppose their relationship. They are misguided into kidnapping a wealthy person for a big ransom by a shrewd uncle who has his own agenda.

title: Swarnakamalam
subTitle: Meenakshi, a young classical dancer who was born in a family of artists, is bitter about the lack of opportunity in India. However, Chandrashekhar changes her outlook and helps her grow.

title: Krazzy 4
subTitle: A psychiatrist takes four patients, with an intellectual disability, to watch a cricket match but gets kidnapped. The group tries to find her and seek the help of a girl working for a television channel.

title: Saajan Chale Sasural
subTitle: After Shyamsunder presumes that his first wife Pooja died in a flood, he marries Divya. When he learns that Pooja is alive, he has to juggle between his wives, keeping both his marriages a secret.

title: Saugandh
subTitle: Sarang, an evil landlord, kills Ganga's family. Years later, Shiva, Ganga's son, marries Chand, Sarang's daughter, to seek revenge from Sarang by destroying his ego.

title: Karan Arjun
subTitle: Karan and Arjun, two brothers driven by revenge, are murdered by their uncle while seeking justice for their father's death. However, they resurrect years later to settle their unfinished score.

title: Zakhmi Sipahi
subTitle: Shakti is an honest police officer out to avenge the death of his father. He faces many trials and tribulations in his journey towards fulfilling this task.

title: Mard
subTitle: Azad, a wealthy prosperous king, is locked in a dungeon by General Dyer who wants to take over his kingdom. Years later, Azad's son comes to his father's rescue and puts an end to Dyer's tyranny.

title: Janata Ki Adalat
subTitle: A prisoner named Shankar decides to murder a minister but his plans are thwarted by DCP Jyoti. However, Jyoti later teams up with Shankar after she learns about the minister's true colours.
